mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, birthday, email, phone, family_id, created_at, updated_at FROM user_base WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, birthday, email, phone, family_id, created_at, updated_at FROM user_base WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_base (id, username, password_hash, birthday, email, phone, family_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{birthday}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{familyId})
